calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Ownership Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-11-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Kale Heiman, Esq., for Darin Keith, Trustee.

At the court's query, counsel confirms that all of Settlor's children are Trust Beneficiaries. The court and counsel discuss the reason why the VA previous held the title to the Estate's Real Property reporting that it was a condition for a loan. The court confirms that counsel knows of no objections to the instant petition.

After additional discussion, the matter is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Stephen M. Murphy. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Chwin. Not Reported.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Ownership Of Real Property
Off Calendar Apr-22-2025 Continued To Jun-10-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kale Heiman for Darin Keith, Trustee (via Zoom).

The court inquired as to whether San Francisco County is the appropriate venue for this action. Ms. Heiman argued venue is appropriate in San Francisco based on the decedents' primary residence, the location of real properties and trust assets, the use of a San Francisco-based realtor and tax preparer, and the location of a trust bank account.

The Court continued the matter to June 10, 2025, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204, to allow for further review of the petition. The Court suggested that Ms. Heiman file an amended declaration addressing venue before the next hearing.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Ownership Of Real Property
